description_long: This street food stall features a compact, rectangular structure with a white canopy roof and a serving counter at the front, surrounded by several seated and standing customers. The stall is equipped with various food items, utensils, and containers visible on the counter and shelves, suggesting active food preparation and service. A large blue gas cylinder is connected to the stall, likely powering cooking equipment inside. The counter is flanked by stools for customers, and the vendor is positioned behind the counter, engaging with patrons. The exterior is primarily painted in shades of blue and white, with some metallic and plastic elements visible in the cooking and storage areas. The overall scene is lively, with a mix of people and food items creating a bustling urban street food atmosphere.
description: A lively street food stall with a white canopy, blue counter, and stools, surrounded by customers and a visible gas cylinder for cooking. The setup is busy, with food items and utensils displayed on the counter.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main serving counter, several customers seated on stools, and a group of people standing nearby.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cooking area, gas cylinder, and more details of the food preparation setup, with customers interacting from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the vendor behind the counter, with food items and utensils visible, and fewer customers in sight.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the back of the stall, the canopy, and the arrangement of customers around the stall.
attribute_serving_counter: A rectangular, waist-high counter made of wood and metal, painted blue and white, with food items and utensils arranged on top. The counter is open to customers and has no visible glass shield.
attribute_food_display: Food is displayed openly on the counter in trays and containers, easily accessible to the vendor and visible to customers, with no protective covering.
